title: pteridella involuta
intro: Pteridella involuta, also known as the "Involuted Fern," is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Pteridella involuta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
